title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) Price Forecast & Scenarios
content: Analyzing the price [movement](/movement) of [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) [Cash](/cash-4) requires an objective look at historical performance data and prevailing market conditions within the current $2.67T total market cap landscape. As of April 25, 2026, [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) [Cash](/cash-4) is trading at $454.81, representing a -0.24% shift over the past day. | Metric | Details | | --- | --- | | Current Price | $454.81 | | 24H Change | -0.24% | | Market Rank | #16 | | Date | April 25, 2026 | ## Recent Market Action Over the past 30 days, BCH has displayed a range between a high of $570.19 and a low of $442.13, resulting in an average price of $472.30 and a net change of -16.64%. Over a one-year horizon, the token has shown a broader fluctuation between a high of $654.65 and a low of $268.92, marking a positive annual change of 45.71%. This indicates that while short-term pressure is present, the asset has retained significant value on a yearly basis. ## Key Price Levels Historical data shows that BCH reached an all-time high of $3,785.82 on December 20, 2017, and fell to an all-time low of $76.93 on December 16, 2018. Current resistance levels are often tested near previous short-term highs, while support is historically solidified at lower valuation brackets. Market participants often look at these pivot points to gauge momentum. ## Valuation Scenarios The outlook for [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) [Cash](/cash-4) is contingent on broader market adoption and its ability to maintain its role as a payment rail. A base case assumes the token continues to trade within existing volatility parameters, tied to the performance of its peers like [Zcash](/zcash) and [Litecoin](/litecoin). A bull scenario would require a surge in institutional transactional demand or a significant shift in the sector's utility narrative. Conversely, a bear case considers the impact of declining network utilization or increased competition from newer Layer 1 protocols. ## Risk Profile [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) Cash holds a TokenRadar Risk Score of 6, indicating a medium risk profile. This classification takes into account its historical volatility index of 36 and its status as a mature, established asset. Investors often utilize this score to balance their portfolio exposure when comparing established PoW chains against speculative sectors like the current top-performing Wrapped-Tokens. ## Sector Comparison When compared to assets such as [Litecoin](/litecoin), which also serves as a peer-to-peer transactional currency, or [Zcash](/zcash), which emphasizes privacy features, Bitcoin Cash maintains a focus on throughput capacity. Its growth potential index of 37 suggests that, while it is a stable component of many portfolios, it may be subject to the broader cyclical trends of the legacy crypto market. ## FAQ 1. What is the current status of BCH volatility? The volatility index is measured at 36, suggesting moderate fluctuations. 2. How has BCH performed over the last year? The token recorded a 45.71% increase over the past year. 3. What is the main driver of price for BCH? Primarily adoption as a medium of exchange and its position as a major Bitcoin fork. --- *Disclaimer: This article is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.
